bonusTasks.title: Swiggy Instamart Launch — Inside the GTM
bonusTasks.summary: Swiggy launched Instamart in 45 days. Their GTM strategy focused on a single city (Bengaluru) and a single use case (late-night snacks) before expanding.
keyTakeaways: Narrow GTM beats broad launch — pick one city, one use case, one customer type
Speed to learning matters more than speed to scale in the first 90 days
Dark stores required re-negotiating the entire supply chain — GTM and ops are inseparable
